title: B2C Premium — Dashboard
content:
Overview


The Premium Dashboard is the home page for individual B2C subscribers. It provides a summary of learning activity, quick access to courses, and a notification system.



Stats Grid


Four stat cards appear at the top:


  • Enrolled Courses: Number of self-study courses the user is enrolled in
  • Average Grade: Overall average across all completed quizzes (displays as a percentage)
  • Quizzes Completed: Total number of quizzes taken across all courses
  • Study Days: Number of days the user has been active on the platform


Recent Activity


A feed showing the user's latest actions, such as:


  • Started reading a textbook chapter
  • Completed a quiz
  • Enrolled in a new course

Each activity item shows an icon, description, and timestamp.



Quick Access


Four shortcut buttons provide fast navigation:


  • Continue Learning: Opens My Courses to resume studying
  • Study Materials: Opens the scientific calculator, formula sheets, and unit converter
  • View Progress: Opens the Progress page with course completion and performance stats
  • Need a Tutor?: Links to the tutoring assistance page for live help


Sidebar Navigation


The sidebar provides access to all premium features:


  • Dashboard: This page
  • My Courses: Enrolled courses with textbook, quizzes, flashcards, videos, and past questions
  • All Courses: Browse and enroll in 30+ courses across physics, math, chemistry, biology, economics, and SAT prep
  • Study Materials: Calculator, formula sheets, and unit converter
  • Progress: Course progress tracking and overall performance
  • Subscription: Plan management, billing, and cancellation
  • Settings: Profile, password, 2FA, notifications, and theme


Notification Bell


A bell icon in the top-right corner shows a red badge with unread notification count. Notifications include:


  • New features or content added
  • Subscription reminders
  • Account updates

Click the bell to view notifications and use "Mark all read" to clear them.



Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "Your dashboard stats update automatically as you complete quizzes and study."
  • "Use Continue Learning to jump right back into your courses."
  • "The notification bell alerts you about new content and account updates."
  • "Need a Tutor? links to live tutoring if you need extra help beyond self-study."
